label: The Ledgerbound Exchange
description: The Ledgerbound Exchange operates as a licensed countinghouse and mercantile shop set into Varric Holdfast’s steep-laned inner ward, its facade built of salvaged ashlar patched with newer brick. Inside, iron-grilled counters and lockable pigeonholes divide the public floor from record alcoves, while a wall of posted tariffs and city ordinances asserts the primacy of codified trade law. Wax-sealed chests, calibrated scales, and ink-stained desks define a space designed for audited transactions rather than casual barter. A recessed niche displays current interdiction notices and hazard placards for breach-sites beyond the gates, binding commerce to the city’s perimeter anxieties.
